user.title: Set up My Music Library
user.description: Enter the URL of your Music Assistant server ({ma_url_hint}). Required for search and library browsing.

data_description.ma_token: Long-lived access token required only if your Music Assistant server enforces authentication (e.g. HAOS with HA auth enabled). Leave empty if no authentication is needed.

error.invalid_url: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://

abort.already_configured: My Music Library is already configured
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed

init.title: Player settings
init.description: Select players to hide from the device picker. You can also type a wildcard pattern (e.g. `media_player.browser_mod_*`) and press Enter to exclude all matching players.

data_description.ma_token: Leave empty if no authentication is needed. Setting this here overrides the value entered during initial setup.
